college_name: College of International Transport and Logistics
parent_institution: Arab Academy for Science, Technology and Maritime Transport (AASTMT)
overview: The College of International Transport and Logistics at Dokki offers a world-class education in global trade and logistics, combining innovative teaching methods with strong practical and industry-oriented experience. The college prepares students to navigate the complexities of international transport and global supply chains and to make an impact on international markets.
welcome_message: AASTMT College of International Transport and Logistics in Dokki provides students with state-of-the-art facilities, industry-leading faculty, and a vibrant academic community that connects cultures and economies on a global scale.

undergraduate_program.program_name: Trade Logistics and International Transport Management
undergraduate_program.program_description: A comprehensive program designed to equip students with theoretical knowledge and practical skills required to succeed in the rapidly evolving fields of logistics and international trade.
undergraduate_program.program_outcome: Graduates are prepared to become innovative leaders capable of addressing global trade and logistics challenges.

why_citl: High global demand for logistics and supply chain professionals
Strong focus on international transport and trade
Integration of theory with real-world practice
Preparation for careers in a globalized business environment

student_experience.student_life: Active student life with academic, professional, and extracurricular activities

partners.industry_and_academic_partners: Multiple local and international partners supporting education, training, and employment opportunities
